OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: FetchShiftAndFacilityTitle

childElements.name: DRE_FetchShiftRecords
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "ShiftTypeOptions" : "=%ShiftTypeOptions%", "ContextId" : "=%ContextId%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DREFetchShiftRecords", "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ ], "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "ignoreCache" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperTurboAction2", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: DRT_TransformShiftsRecs
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "IF(TOSTRING(%DRE_FetchShiftRecords%) == \"{}\", false , true)", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "%DRE_FetchShiftRecords:Shifts%", "sendJSONNode" : "Shifts", "bundle" : "DRTTransformShiftsRecs", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "ignoreCache" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperTransformAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: SV_ForShift
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "elementValueMap" : { "isEmployedNP_PA" : "=IF(%EmploymentTypeForShift% == \"Employed\", true, false)" }, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "isEmployedNP_PA", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "SetValues4", "disOnTplt" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: DRE_GetCodeSets
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "CodeSetType" : "%SelectedCodeSetType%", "isActive" : true }, "additionalOutput" : { "facilityTitlesData" : "=FILTER(LIST(DRE_GetCodeSets:CodeSetRecs), 'CodeSetType == \"Facility Title\"')", "type" : "=FILTER(LIST(DRE_GetCodeSets:CodeSetRecs), 'CodeSetType == \"' + type + '\"')", "variableTypeEncounterData" : "=LIST(FILTER(LIST(DRE_GetCodeSets:CodeSetRecs), 'Name == \"Encounter\"'))", "variableTypeOtherData" : "=FILTER(LIST(DRE_GetCodeSets:CodeSetRecs), 'Name != \"Encounter\" && CodeSetType == \"Variable\"'))" }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : true, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "FetchedCodeSets", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DREGetCodeSets", "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ ], "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "ignoreCache" : false, "isActive" : true, "disOnTplt" : false, "id" : "", "restOptions" : { } }

omniProcessElements.name: RA_SendFetchedData
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "useFormulas" : true, "additionalOutput" : { "propMapFacilityTitle" : { "stepName" : "STP_SelectShiftFacilityTitle", "componentName" : "FacilityTitle", "label" : "Facility Titles", "options" : "%facilityTitlesData:facilityTitlesData%", "fieldName" : "Facility Title", "required" : true }, "propMapType" : { "required" : true, "fieldName" : "Type", "options" : "=IF(ISNOTBLANK(%FetchedCodeSets:type%),IF(%type% != 'Variable',LIST(%FetchedCodeSets:type%),IF(%type% == 'Variable' && %variableType% == 'Encounter', LIST(%FetchedCodeSets:variableTypeEncounterData%),LIST(%FetchedCodeSets:variableTypeOtherData%))),LIST())", "label" : "Type", "componentName" : "Type", "stepName" : "STP_SelectShiftFacilityTitle" }, "shifts" : "=%DRT_TransformShiftsRecs%", "selectedShiftsCount" : "=IF(%type% == \"Shift\" && %isShiftTypeGotChanged% == true , 0 ,IF(%type% == \"Shift\" && %isShiftTypeGotChanged% == false,%F_SelectedShiftsCount%, 0),0)", "previousShiftType" : "=IF(%type% == \"Shift\", %ShiftTypeOptions%,\"\")" }, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : true, "returnFullDataJSON" : false, "responseFormat" : "JSON", "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "responseDefaultData" : { }, "vlcResponseHeaders" : { }, "isActive" : true, "disOnTplt" : false, "id" : "", "restOptions" : { } }

omniProcessElements.name: SetCodeSetType
SV_FilterFacilityTitles
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "elementValueMap" : { "facilityTitlesData" : "=IF( %type% == \"Bonus\", LIST(FILTER(LIST(%FetchedCodeSets:facilityTitlesData%),'Can_Have_Bonus__c == true')), IF( %type% == \"Stipend\", LIST(FILTER(LIST(%FetchedCodeSets:facilityTitlesData%),'Can_Have_Stipend__c == true')), IF( %type% == \"Leadership Incentives\", LIST(FILTER(LIST(%FetchedCodeSets:facilityTitlesData%),'Can_Have_Leadership_Incentive__c == true')), IF( %type% == \"Shift\", IF( %ShiftTypeOptions% == \"NP/PA\", LIST(FILTER(LIST(%FetchedCodeSets:facilityTitlesData%),'INCLUDES(Shift_Type__c, \"' + %ShiftTypeOptions% + '\")' + ' && EE_NP_PA_Rates__c == \"' + %isEmployedNP_PA:isEmployedNP_PA% + '\"')), LIST(FILTER(LIST(%FetchedCodeSets:facilityTitlesData%),'INCLUDES(Shift_Type__c, \"' + %ShiftTypeOptions% + '\")')) ), LIST(%FetchedCodeSets:facilityTitlesData%) ) ) ) )" }, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "facilityTitlesData", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "SetValues8", "disOnTplt" : false }

OmniIntegrationProcedure.propertySetConfig: { "linkToExternalObject" : "", "trackingCustomData" : { }, "includeAllActionsInResponse" : false, "columnsPropertyMap" : [ ], "relationshipFieldsMap" : [ ], "labelSingular" : "", "labelPlural" : "", "description" : "", "nameColumn" : "", "rollbackOnError" : false, "chainableQueriesLimit" : 50, "chainableDMLStatementsLimit" : null, "chainableCpuLimit" : 2000, "chainableHeapSizeLimit" : null, "chainableDMLRowsLimit" : null, "chainableQueryRowsLimit" : null, "chainableSoslQueriesLimit" : null, "chainableActualTimeLimit" : null, "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "queueableChainableQueriesLimit" : 120, "queueableChainableCpuLimit" : 40000, "queueableChainableHeapSizeLimit" : 6, "ttlMinutes" : 5, "mockResponseMap" : { } }
